channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Two mothers, each certain a viral Gaza prisoner photo shows her son
item.description: Two Palestinian mothers believe a viral image of a bound Gaza detainee shows their missing son.

item.title: At least nine police officers killed in southwestern Pakistan attack
item.description: Shahid Rind, a spokesman for the Balochistan government, says 15 assailants killed in 'clearance operations'.

item.title: Displaced Gaza farmers turn to dirt near tents to grow crops
item.description: Israel has devastated 95 percent of Gaza's farms, engineering starvation and aid dependency, experts warn.

item.title: Argentina vs Egypt LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as Argentina play Egypt in the round of 16 knockout stage.

item.title: France appeals court opens door for Le Pen presidential run, with ankle tag
item.description: Paris appeals court rules Le Pen guilty of misusing public funds but reduces the ban on her holding public office.

item.title: Ships attacked in the Strait of Hormuz: What that means for ongoing talks
item.description: While marine traffic in Hormuz has steadily risen, vague provisions on the strait remain contentious in peace talks.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 26: Co-hosts USA and Ronaldo’s Portugal eliminated
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: What does Trump want from his NATO allies?
item.description: What does Trump want from his NATO allies?

item.title: Egypt coach makes impassioned plea for Palestine in pre-match conference
item.description: Egypt coach makes impassioned plea for Palestine in pre-match conference

item.title: The Responsibility to Protect doctrine can be resurrected
item.description: The legal norm has been manipulated and forgotten. But today it is needed more than ever

item.title: Bangladesh landslides kill nine, including eight Rohingya in refugee camp
item.description: Hillsides collapse at four locations at camps in Cox's Bazar in southeastern Bangladesh amid monsoon rains.

item.title: Ukrainian drones hit Russian fuel tankers
item.description: Ukrainian drones hit Russian fuel tankers

item.title: What is the new Gaza administration as Hamas dissolves government?
item.description: The NCAG will oversee civilian affairs such as health and education, as well as security.

item.title: UK High Court to rule in Prince Harry’s Daily Mail privacy case
item.description: UK High Court to rule on a privacy case brought by Prince Harry against Daily Mail publisher.

item.title: Explosions in Damascus during Macron visit to Syria: What we know
item.description: Blasts occurred near hotel French president was reportedly staying in shortly after he departed for presidential palace.

item.title: Syria’s capital rocked by blasts during Macron visit
item.description: Syria’s capital rocked by blasts during Macron visit

item.title: USA crashes out after 4–1 defeat to Belgium
item.description: Belgium thrashed the USA 4–1 to knock the host nation out of the World Cup, leaving home fans stunned.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Argentina vs Egypt, Ronaldo exit and Mbappe condemns racism
item.description: Argentina continue their knockout journey against Egypt as Switzerland and Colombia also fight for progression.

item.title: Switzerland vs Colombia: FIFA World Cup last 16 – prediction, start, news
item.description: Colombia, the World Cup's dangerous outsiders, take on Switzerland in Vancouver for a place in the quarterfinals.

item.title: After Iran war upheaval, global shipping eyes return to status quo
item.description: Industry known for its resilience is likely to emerge from war relatively unchanged, analysts say.

item.title: Explosions in Damascus as French president visits
item.description: Explosions in Damascus as French president visits

item.title: Russia touts ‘war with NATO’ amid losses in Ukraine
item.description: As Russia faces challenges on the frontlines and at home, President Putin's backers decry Kyiv's Western allies.

item.title: Eighteen wounded as explosions rock Damascus during Macron’s visit to Syria
item.description: At least 18 people, including four police officers, were wounded in the blasts, Syria's Interior Ministry says.

item.title: LIVE: Trump, NATO leaders in Turkiye’s Ankara as defence tops summit agenda
item.description: Defence spending and support for Ukraine's military needs are expected to top the agenda of summit in Turkish capital.

item.title: France’s Court of Appeal to rule on Le Pen conviction – what it’s all about
item.description: The far-right leader could be prevented from running for president in 2027 if embezzlement charges are upheld.
